name: Task 3: Cascading Timeout Failure
alert_message: CRITICAL: Service A is timing out while waiting for Service B, opening the circuit breaker and causing a cascading failure. Inspect both services, stabilize the request path, and write an RCA.md.

regex_checks.message: Service A timeout was not increased.
RCA.md must include a Root Cause section.
RCA.md must include an Affected Services section.
RCA.md must include a Fix Applied section.
RCA.md must include a Prevention section.
